title: Cookie Policy
heading: Cookie Policy
intro: This website uses a native BarkinMad Studios cookie consent system so visitors can control optional analytics and advertising cookies.

hero.alt: Privacy and data protection themed workspace representing security and trust

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit websites.
They help websites remember information about your visit, improve performance, and support certain website features.

sections.heading: Cookie Categories
paragraphs: Essential Cookies are always enabled. They support core website operation and store the first-party BarkinMad Studios cookie preference record.
Analytics Cookies are optional. They allow Google Analytics to measure page views, browser information, device category, and general website interactions.
Advertising Cookies are optional. They support Google AdSense advertising storage, ad user data, and ad personalisation signals where advertising is active.

sections.heading: Essential Cookies
paragraphs: Purpose: keep the website operating and remember whether optional cookies have been accepted or rejected.
Provider: BarkinMad Studios.
Retention: the cookie preference record is stored for up to 180 days unless removed earlier through browser settings.
User controls: essential cookies cannot be disabled through the website preference panel because they are required for the preference system to work.

sections.heading: Analytics Cookies
paragraphs: Purpose: understand how visitors use the website so pages, content, and performance can be improved.
Provider: Google Analytics.
Retention: Google Analytics cookie retention is controlled by Google and may vary by configuration, browser behaviour, consent state, and future Google product settings.
User controls: analytics cookies are disabled by default until analytics consent is granted. Consent can be changed using Cookie Preferences in the footer.

sections.heading: Advertising Cookies
paragraphs: Purpose: allow Google AdSense to provide advertising, measure ad performance, and support personalised or non-personalised advertising where applicable.
Provider: Google AdSense and Google advertising services.
Retention: Advertising cookie retention is controlled by Google and may vary by product settings, consent state, browser behaviour, region, and future AdSense requirements.
User controls: advertising cookies are disabled by default until advertising consent is granted. Consent can be changed using Cookie Preferences in the footer.

sections.heading: Google Consent Mode v2
paragraphs: The website uses Google Consent Mode v2 to communicate consent choices before Google Analytics or Google AdSense are initialised.
Consent signals include analytics_storage, ad_storage, ad_user_data, and ad_personalization.
When optional consent is rejected, the website does not load the corresponding optional Google service.

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
paragraphs: New visitors can accept all optional cookies, reject non-essential cookies, or manage Analytics and Advertising choices separately.
Saved choices can be changed at any time using the Cookie Preferences control in the website footer.
Most web browsers also allow you to control or disable cookies through browser settings.
Disabling cookies may affect certain website functionality or features.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
paragraphs: Third-party providers such as Google, Apple, analytics platforms, or social media services may apply their own cookies and privacy technologies when interacting with this website.
These services operate under their own privacy and cookie policies.

sections.heading: Policy Updates
paragraphs: This Cookie Policy may be updated periodically as website features, analytics, or advertising services evolve.
